summary: Supplier Integration Hardening (P3 Platform Integrations) - All features PASSED. E2E Booking Test orchestrator working correctly with 6/6 steps passing for all 4 suppliers in simulation mode. Supplier health, sync status, and test history endpoints all functional.

minor.issue: 400 errors due to missing tenant context (pre-existing, not related to P3)

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1,-1) when container not visible - doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: supplier_booking_test_service.py: Well-structured 6-step E2E test orchestrator with proper error handling and timing
ratehawk_sync_adapter.py: Good retry logic with exponential backoff and jitter
inventory_sync_service.py: Duplicate sync prevention and stuck job detection working correctly
InventorySyncDashboardPage.jsx: All data-testid attributes present for test buttons and panels

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all E2E test buttons working, history loading correctly)

seed_data_creation: None required - simulation mode generates test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 Platform Integrations phase complete. E2E Booking Test feature working in simulation mode. All 4 suppliers (Ratehawk, Paximum, Tbo, Wwtatil) return 6/6 passed steps. History panel shows test records. Backend APIs tested with pytest (14 tests passed).

POST /api/inventory/booking/test.details: 6-step E2E test (search, detail, revalidation, booking, status_check, cancel) working for all suppliers

GET /api/inventory/booking/test/history.details: Returns test history list with proper structure

POST /api/inventory/sync/trigger.details: Duplicate sync prevention working - second call shows already_running or completed

GET /api/inventory/supplier-health.details: Returns health status for all 4 suppliers (ratehawk, paximum, tbo, wwtatil)

GET /api/inventory/sync/status.details: Returns sync status for all suppliers with inventory counts

Frontend E2E Booking Test panel.test_results_display: Shows step-by-step status with timing and details

Frontend test history.details: Gecmis button loads test history table with supplier, mode, result, steps, duration, date columns

mocked_apis.note: All supplier APIs are in SIMULATION mode - no real external API calls made. System returns simulated data.

e2e_test_step_details.detail: Gets hotel details from inventory cache
e2e_test_step_details.revalidation: Simulates price revalidation with drift calculation
e2e_test_step_details.booking: Creates simulated test booking in supplier_test_bookings collection
e2e_test_step_details.cancel: Cancels the test booking (updates status to 'cancelled')
